text:
Underground Ruins (地下遺跡, Chika Iseki) are ruins located in the country of Midonite that only appears in the Hunter × Hunter: Altar of Dragon Vein game. Hunter × Hunter: Altar of Dragon Vein 

Overview

The Underground Ruins are ruins in Midonite that were recently discovered by the Midonite Government Environment Protection Bureau. At the entrance, tortoises and other creatures can be found. While the path leading there is typical cave infrastructure, the ruins themselves are built with cobblestone and filled with Flying Lizards. Furthermore, various marble statues of flying creatures can be found throughout. 

Plot

Altar of Dragon Vein

 Note: Events occurring in Altar of Dragon Vein do not constitute canon material. Furthermore, some events may slightly differ depending on the current player character. 

Hoping to find a hint on proceeding onward into the Forest Ruins, Killua and Leorio head over there. As the group travels below, they soon find a flying masked marionette. It summons various skeleton monsters to fight the duo. Once it's defeated, they proceed onward. 

Deeper in the ruins, they find a room with a golden ring. Leorio speculates that no one has reached this room since it was there. As the group considers showing Romaria the ring, Kurapika suddenly appears. He demands that they give him the ring instead. He then resorts to force, taking the ring and handing it to Amane. It is promptly revealed that Amane is mind-controlling him with his Nen ability. 

Amane then realizes the two boys to be from the Hunter Association. He thanks them for doing the work for him. As Killua and Leorio pursue them, he forces Kurapika to fight them. To properly end the fight, the duo must instead attack Amane. Once defeated, Kurapika is left lying on the floor as Amane leaves with the ring. Killua and Leorio bring Kurapika to the airship for Ponzu to heal him. It is later revealed the ring before was the key to the Forest Ruins door. There are two required.
